summary: Iteration 82: Complete testing of Sentinel Lock page NEW features - manufacturer images, embedded video, and bajo pedido pricing updates. ALL TESTS PASSED. 2 user-provided manufacturer images load from customer-assets URL with hover effects and overlaid text. Video player with MP4 source, poster, and controls works. All bajo pedido/pago anticipado text updates verified in hero, pricing section, and cross-sell on Alarmas page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 verified all NEW features added to Sentinel Lock page. (1) Manufacturer gallery (data-testid=manufacturer-gallery) contains 2 user-provided images from customer-assets.emergentagent.com with hover scale effect and overlaid text - 'Electronica interna' and 'Mecanismo multipunto'. (2) Video section (data-testid=video-section) has 'VIDEO PRESENTACION' badge, title 'Sentinel Lock: El Bombin Inteligente Europeo', and video player (data-testid=sentinel-video) with MP4 source from customer-assets, poster from hero image, and controls attribute. (3) Hero shows 'Producto bajo pedido | Pago anticipado | Instalacion GRATIS'. (4) Pricing section (data-testid=lock-pricing) shows amber badge 'PRODUCTO BAJO PEDIDO — FABRICACION 15-20 DIAS' with AlertTriangle icon, 'Pago anticipado obligatorio' highlighted box, feature list with 'Fabricacion bajo pedido (15-20 dias)', price 249 EUR, and CTA 'Reservar Sentinel Lock — 249 EUR'. (5) Alarmas page (/alarmas-hogar) cross-sell (data-testid=sentinel-lock-crosssell) mentions 'Producto bajo pedido — pago anticipado obligatorio' with 249 EUR price.
